# Yacht Away Now

> Luxury private yacht charter company based in St. Petersburg, FL operating a 52ft Marquis Flybridge for sunset cruises, celebrations, and Bahamas adventures.

## Docs

- [Pricing](https://www.yachtawaynow.com/pricing): Charter rates, packages, and what is included
- [FAQ](https://www.yachtawaynow.com/faq): Common questions about capacity, pricing, and bookings
- [Our Yacht](https://www.yachtawaynow.com/our-yacht): 52ft Marquis Flybridge specifications and amenities
- [Contact](https://www.yachtawaynow.com/contact): Book a charter or ask questions
- [Blog](https://www.yachtawaynow.com/blog): Yacht charter tips, guides, and Tampa Bay insights

## About
Yacht Away Now is a luxury private yacht charter company based in St. Petersburg, Florida. We operate a 52ft Marquis Flybridge yacht offering sunset cruises, day charters, bachelorette parties, birthday celebrations, and multi-day Bahamas adventures on Florida's Gulf Coast. Multiple yachts available upon request.

## Key Facts
- Location: St. Petersburg, FL (Tampa Bay area)
- Vessel: 52ft Marquis Flybridge
- Capacity: Up to 13 guests
- Range: 600 miles (Bahamas capable)
- Decks: 3 levels of luxury
- Engine: 1320hp, 30+ knot speed
- Cabin: 1,200 sq ft interior
- Outdoor: 800+ sq ft deck space

## Services
- Sunset Cruises (4-5 hours)
- Day Charters (4+ hours)
- Bachelorette Parties
- Birthday Celebrations
- Corporate Events & Team Retreats
- Overnight Charters
- Multi-Day Bahamas & Florida Keys Trips

## Pricing
- Hourly: $300/hr (4-hour minimum, +$50/hr fuel, +$100/hr captain)
- Weekend 4-hr: $2,000 (11am-2pm)
- Weekend 5-hr: $2,500 (2:30pm-7:30pm)
- Overnight/Bahamas: Starting at $5,000+
